name: Premium UI Plugin
description: A professional design system plugin that establishes and enforces repository-wide UI standards. Provides skills for premium UI design, component architecture, consistency audits, and design critique. Prevents generic startup aesthetics and enforces thoughtful, serious, and trustworthy product design.
author: sezzo

skills.name: design-system-setup
skills.description: Initializes or updates the repository's premium UI design-system setup by creating or patching AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.

skills.name: design-system-review
skills.description: Reviews an existing design system for consistency, completeness, and premium quality standards.

skills.name: ui-component-design
skills.description: Designs new reusable UI components with proper states, variants, and design-system integration.

skills.name: premium-ui-refinement
skills.description: Elevates existing UI to feel more premium through refined spacing, typography, hierarchy, and details.

skills.name: ux-consistency-audit
skills.description: Audits screens and flows for interaction consistency, pattern reuse, clarity, and UX maturity.

skills.name: screen-composition-design
skills.description: Builds or restructures full screens with proper layout, hierarchy, and component usage.

skills.name: token-architecture
skills.description: Defines scalable token systems (colors, typography, spacing, etc.) for design system foundations.

skills.name: component-implementation-spec
skills.description: Creates implementation-ready engineering handoff specifications for components.

skills.name: design-critique
skills.description: Provides sharp, high-standard critical review of design work against premium UI principles.

skills.name: brand-ui-alignment
skills.description: Checks whether UI properly expresses the intended brand character and values.

skills.name: responsive-adaptive-design
skills.description: Defines responsive layout strategies, breakpoint systems, mobile-first patterns, and adaptive behavior across all viewport sizes.

skills.name: accessibility
skills.description: Audits and defines accessibility standards based on WCAG 2.2, covering screen reader support, keyboard navigation, color contrast, and inclusive design.
